jobline.lineDescription: Size: 36mm x 80mm||Material: PE AP901||Print Colour: 6 Colour||Tool: D0892(3,7)(3,2)0.6mm Complex||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: MATTE VARNISH||MACHINE APPLIED||Qty: 160.000||5,000 x Amazon Baby Blue PANTONE 290 C 5,000 x Amazon Baby Pink PANTONE 217 C 5,000 x Amazon Black NEUTRAL BLACK C 5,000 x Amazon Blue Bell PANTONE 2707 C 5,000 x Amazon Blush PANTONE 705 C 5,000 x Amazon Burgundy PANTONE 7641 C 5,000 x Amazon Candy PANTONE 218 C / TEXT PANTONE 217 C 5,000 x Amazon Chocolate PANTONE 478 C 5,000 x Amazon Clay PANTONE 7572 C 5,000 x Amazon Dusk PANTONE 501 C 5,000 x Amazon Emerald PANTONE 2244 C 5,000 x Amazon Forest PANTOEN 356 C 5,000 x Amazon Fuchsia PANTONE 233 C 5,000 x Amazon Green PANTONE 2423 C 5,000 x Amazon Hot Pink MATCH DIGITAL SAMPLE (CMYK 0/90/0/0) 5,000 x Amazon Latte PANTONE 482 C 5,000 x Amazon Lavender PANTONE 2092 C 5,000 x Amazon Lilac PANTONE 2050 C 5,000 x Amazon Merlot PANTONE 7427 C 5,000 x Amazon Mint PANTONE 358 C 5,000 x Amazon Navy PANTONE 3581 C 5,000 x Amazon Nude PANTONE PMS P 52-1 C 5,000 x Amazon Orange PANTONE 1575 C 5,000 x Amazon Purple PANTONE 266 C 5,000 x Amazon Red PANTONE 1788 C 5,000 x Amazon Rose PANTONE 182 C 5,000 x Amazon Royal PANTONE 2370 C 5,000 x Amazon Sage PANTONE 2404 C 5,000 x Amazon Sky Blue PANTONE 305 C 5,000 x Amazon Tiffany PANTONE 324 C 5,000 x Amazon White 100% WHITE 5,000 x Amazon Yellow PANTONE 102 C||Group discount applied Machine applied 3mm gap Rolls of 5,000
